summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CotizaBot authentication system and landing pages. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including landing page branding, pricing display, registration flow, login flow, and protected route redirect.
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: pdf_service.py and whatsapp_service are partially implemented/mocked - not fully functional for production
Code quality is good - proper async/await usage, JWT authentication, password hashing with bcrypt
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during testing for registration flow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_auth.py cover: health check, registration, duplicate email rejection, login with valid/invalid credentials, /auth/me endpoint, and /cotizaciones/estadisticas endpoint. Frontend tests verified: landing page branding (CotizaBot by CotizaExpress.com), hero CTA (5 cotizaciones gratis), footer contact info (+52 81 3078 3171, contacto@arobegroup.com), pricing page (Plan Gratis $0/5 cotizaciones, Plan Completo $1,000 MXN), registration flow, login flow, and ProtectedRoute redirect.

backend: POST /api/auth/registro - New user and empresa creation with 'gratis' plan
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user and empresa data with plan limits
GET /api/cotizaciones/estadisticas - Returns plan limits (5 for gratis)
frontend: Landing page - Logo and branding 'CotizaBot by CotizaExpress.com'
Landing page - Hero CTA '5 cotizaciones gratis'
Landing page - Footer contact info (+52 81 3078 3171, contacto@arobegroup.com)
Precios page - Plan Completo ($1,000 MXN/mes + IVA)
Registration flow - Form submission and redirect to dashboard
Login flow - Valid credentials redirect to dashboard
Login flow - Invalid credentials show error toast

mocked_services.pdf_service: Partially implemented - generates PDF but file storage is local
mocked_services.whatsapp_service: Partially implemented - Twilio integration present but not fully tested
